cards.title: Obsidian Forge Warden

ability.name: Molten Aegis
ability.text: Taunt. Armor 2. When this unit blocks an attack, deal 2 damage to the attacking unit.

cards.image_prompt: A hulking demonic smith forged from black basalt and liquid lava, glowing red fissures across its muscular chest, wearing heavy ornate iron plates, standing inside a volcanic forge, sparks and embers floating in the air, intense chiaroscuro lighting, cinematic dark fantasy style.
cards.image_notes: Use a palette of charcoal black, deep crimson, and bright orange. Low angle shot to make the creature appear imposing. High detail, 3:4 aspect ratio. No text, no borders.
